documents.desc: K grade complete — 7th grade data missing — submission incomplete

documents.desc: Inspection Feb 2025 — 2 minor violations — reinspection pending

documents.name: Teacher_Qualifications.pdf
documents.label: Teacher Qualification Records
documents.desc: 3 teachers missing bachelor's degree or 3yr experience documentation

documents.name: SCF1_Scholarship_Form.pdf
documents.label: Scholarship Compliance Form SCF-1
documents.desc: Filed March 8, 2025 — MISSED March 1 deadline by 7 days

documents.name: Affidavit_Good_Moral_Character_Log.pdf
documents.label: Affidavit of Good Moral Character Log
documents.desc: 6 new hires reviewed; 2 notarized after start date (flagged)

results.evidence: Survey submitted May 3, 2025 — 2 days past the May 1st statutory deadline. Additionally, notary seal is missing from the filed document.
results.action: Resubmit survey with proper notarization immediately. Contact FLDOE to request late-filing waiver. Risk: scholarship eligibility jeopardized for 2025-26 academic year.

results.evidence: 180 instructional days scheduled. Daily attendance register verified current through Feb 14, 2025.
results.quote: Page 1: 'Academic calendar 2024-25: 180 instructional days. Attendance log updated daily by admin office.'

results.evidence: SCF-1 submitted March 8, 2025 — 7 days past the March 1st hard deadline. Step Up For Students portal shows 'LATE' flag on submission.
results.action: File corrective submission immediately with Step Up For Students. Contact SFO at (877) 880-4994. Risk: scholarship payment suspension for enrolled scholarship students.

results.evidence: Tuition schedule published July 2024. Scholarship rate ($8,500) matches non-scholarship rate ($8,500). Verified by SFO reconciliation.
results.quote: Page 2: 'Tuition 2024-25: Standard $8,500 — Scholarship $8,500 — Rate match confirmed by SFO audit'

results.evidence: Policy active through July 31, 2025. Per occurrence: $1M. Aggregate: $2M. Carrier: Florida Peninsula Insurance.
results.quote: Page 1: 'Policy active — expires Jul 31, 2025 — minimum limits met per state requirement'

results.evidence: 1 staff member (J. Martinez, Physical Education) last screened June 2019 — 5 years 8 months ago. Exceeded the 5-year VECHS renewal limit by 8 months.
results.action: Remove J. Martinez from ALL student-contact duties immediately. Initiate emergency VECHS rescreening through FDLE Clearinghouse portal. This is a Level 1 personnel violation.

results.evidence: 44 of 47 teachers have complete qualification files. 3 teachers have incomplete documentation — degrees referenced in contracts but transcripts not on file.
results.quote: Page 5: 'Faculty qualification audit: 44/47 PASS — 3 PENDING: Rodriguez (transcript), Kim (exp. verification), Davis (transcript)'
results.action: Collect official transcripts from 3 teachers within 30 days. Acceptable alternative: Employment verification letters documenting 3+ years experience.

results.evidence: 4 of 6 new hires signed affidavits correctly. 2 were notarized 1 and 3 days after their respective start dates — technically non-compliant.
results.quote: Page 4: 'New hire affidavit compliance: 4/6 timely — 2 late notarizations flagged for corrective action'
results.action: Retroactive notarization does not satisfy the statute. Document the gap and ensure all future hires complete notarization before Day 1.

results.evidence: 41 of 47 staff have signed the 2024-25 Ethics Policy acknowledgement. 6 signatures outstanding — 3 part-time staff and 3 recent hires.
results.quote: Page 3: 'Ethics acknowledgement: 41/47 signed — 6 outstanding as of Feb 10, 2025'
results.action: Collect outstanding 6 signatures within 2 weeks. Part-time and seasonal staff are NOT exempt from this requirement under s. 1012.796.

results.evidence: DH-684 submitted for Kindergarten ONLY. Grade 7 immunization data was not included in the October submission. 7th grade Tdap compliance data is entirely missing.
results.action: File amended DH-684 including 7th Grade Tdap data immediately with Orange County DOH. Contact: 407-858-1400. Statutory deadline was Oct 1 — already past deadline.

results.evidence: 618 of 623 students have current DH-680. 3 students have Part B (Temporary Medical Exemption) that expired, 2 students missing records entirely.
results.quote: Page 3: 'Immunization records: 618/623 — 3 expired temp exemptions — 2 no record on file'
results.action: Contact 5 families. Obtain updated DH-680 or permanent exemption within 5 school days. Students without valid records may be excluded per s. 1003.22.

results.evidence: Inspection completed February 8, 2025. 2 violations found: (1) blocked stairwell exit in Building C, (2) expired fire extinguisher tag in Gymnasium. Reinspection scheduled.
results.quote: Page 2: 'Violations: 2 — #1: Blocked egress stairwell B-C3 — #2: Extinguisher tag expired (Gym) — Reinspection: within 30 days'
results.action: Clear Building C stairwell and replace gymnasium extinguisher tag immediately. Reinspection must occur within 30 days per FFPC requirement.

results.evidence: Monthly drills current. January 2025 drill completed Jan 14. All 12 months logged with signed after-action reports.
results.quote: Page 3: 'Drill log current — 12/12 months completed for 2024-25 academic year — All signed by administration'

results.evidence: Two completed radon tests on record (2016 and 2021). Both results below 4.0 pCi/L action level. Per statute, testing requirement fully met after 2 passing tests.
results.quote: Page 2: 'Radon Test 1: Mar 2016 — 1.9 pCi/L. Test 2: Nov 2021 — 2.3 pCi/L. Statutory exemption: CONFIRMED'

results.evidence: 4 bus drivers — all CDL Class B with P and S endorsements verified. All licenses current with no expirations within 90 days.
results.quote: Page 4: 'Driver license verification complete — 4/4 compliant — all endorsements P/S confirmed'

results.evidence: All 4 driver medical certificates current. Next expiration: August 2025.
results.quote: Page 4: 'Medical certificates: 4/4 valid — nearest expiry: Aug 2025'

results.evidence: 52 international students — 50 active I-20s confirmed. 2 I-20s show 'Initial' status, not yet converted to 'Active'. SEVIS reporting pending.
results.quote: Page 2: 'SEVIS Status: 50 Active, 2 Initial — 2 students pending registration activation'
results.action: PDSO must activate 2 pending I-20s in SEVIS within 30 days of term start. Current risk: moderate. Escalate to SEVP if unresolved within 10 days.

results.evidence: Term start Jan 8, 2025. SEVIS registration completed Jan 11, 2025 — 3 days from term start. Within 30-day window.
results.quote: Page 2: 'Term registration completed Jan 11, 2025 — 3 days from term start — Status: ON TIME'

results.evidence: 3 of 6 new hire I-9s show Section 2 signed on Day 4 or Day 5 — technically in violation of the 3-business-day rule.
results.quote: Page 5: 'I-9 Audit: 3/6 new hires — Section 2 completed on Day 4-5 — Outside 3-day statutory window'
results.action: Document the administrative delay. Correct I-9 completion protocol in onboarding checklist. Fine exposure: $272–$2,701 per violation under current ICE schedule.

results.evidence: 47 teachers — minimum salary $40,600/yr ($780/week). All above the $684/week FLSA threshold for exempt professional classification.
results.quote: Page 7: 'Teacher FLSA compliance confirmed — 47/47 above $684/wk threshold — Min: $780/wk'

results.evidence: FMLA WH-1420 poster was NOT found during facility walkthrough of staff areas. Handbook references FMLA (Section 5.1) but does not include the required full policy text.
results.action: Purchase and post current WH-1420 poster (free download: dol.gov/fmla). Update staff handbook Section 5.1 with complete FMLA policy text. Penalty risk: up to $189/day per violation.

results.evidence: 3 EdTech apps used by students under 13. All have signed parent COPPA consent forms on file. Vendor DPAs reviewed July 2024.
results.quote: Page 6: 'COPPA compliance: 3/3 under-13 apps with parent consent — DPA file current'

results.evidence: 11 vendor DPAs on file and current. All include data-sell prohibition and security standard clauses.
results.quote: Page 8: 'DPA review complete — 11 vendors — 11/11 prohibit data sale — 11/11 define security standard'

results.evidence: No BOI FinCEN filing found on record. Corporate Transparency Act (CTA) required initial filing by January 1, 2024 for existing entities. School has been non-compliant for over 13 months.
results.action: File BOI immediately at fincen.gov/boi — filing is free. Penalties: $500/day of non-compliance up to $10,000 + potential criminal liability for responsible individuals.

results.evidence: 1 cash tuition transaction over $10,000 in 2024-25. Form 8300 filed within 15 days. IRS confirmation on file.
results.quote: Page 2: 'Form 8300 — 1 transaction ($11,200) — Filed Oct 8 for Oct 1 receipt — Within 15-day window — Confirmed'

results.evidence: AHERA Management Plan (AMP) exists but was last updated in 2019. 3-year reinspection was due September 2022 — now overdue by 2+ years. 6-month periodic surveillance logs also incomplete.
results.action: Commission AHERA reinspection by EPA-accredited inspector immediately. Update AMP and make available on-site. Resume 6-month periodic surveillance using trained in-house staff. Fine risk: $37,500/day under TSCA.

results.evidence: OSHA 300A Summary posted in teacher workroom since Feb 1, 2025. 2024 log: 1 recordable incident, properly documented.
results.quote: Page 3: 'OSHA 300A posted — Posting date: Feb 1, 2025 — Recordable incidents 2024: 1'

results.evidence: Chemical Hygiene Plan (CHP) last updated August 2024. SDS binder current with 38 entries. Eyewash weekly inspection log up to date. Lab safety training completed Jan 2025.
results.quote: Page 2: 'CHP Review Date: Aug 2024 — SDS Binder: 38 entries — Eyewash Log: Current — Training: Jan 10, 2025'
